## 👨‍💻 About Me

Backend engineer specializing in **Go microservices** with commercial experience in:
- 🏗️ Designing fault-tolerant distributed systems
- ⚡ Performance optimization & caching strategies
- 🔐 Secure API development (REST/gRPC)
- 📊 Database design & query optimization

Currently working on **Electronic Data Interchange** at OT-OIL, building scalable microservices that handle high-load operations.

## 💼 Professional Highlights

### 🏢 OT-OIL (Sept 2025 – Present)
**Backend Developer (Golang)**

Building internal document management platform:
- ✅ Developed fault-tolerant external API polling service with circuit breaker
- ✅ Reduced response times by 60% with Redis caching optimization
- ✅ Implemented Kafka-based async processing pipeline
- ✅ Eliminated N+1 queries and optimized SQL performance
- ✅ Set up full observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki)

---

## 🚀 Highlighted Projects

### 🛒 **Marketplace Prototype** (Team Lead)
*Yandex Lyceum Golang Specialization*

E-commerce platform similar to Wildberries
- Led team of 3 developers
- Designed microservices architecture
- Implemented OAuth auth & order management services
- Set up full CI/CD pipeline and monitoring

**Stack:** Go, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, gRPC, Docker, GitLab CI, Grafana

---

### 📦 **Order Processing Microservice**
*Wildberries Tech School*

High-performance order handler
- Custom LRU cache with TTL and DB recovery
- Kafka dlq, consumer with worker pool
- Comprehensive metrics and logging

**Stack:** Go, PostgreSQL, Kafka, Prometheus, Grafana

---

### ⏰ **Delayed Notification Service**
*Wildberries Tech School*

Multi-channel notification delivery system
- Background queue processing
- Redis-based status tracking
- Email & Telegram integration

**Stack:** Go, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Docker
